project.name: hris-public
project.summary: Incubating placeholder for a public HRIS-related project with no implementation or production surface declared yet.
goals: Provide a doctrine-compatible entry point for future project initialization.
Require concrete project goals, boundaries, public surfaces, and delivery proof before production work starts.
nonGoals: Do not treat this placeholder as a production HRIS product.
Do not infer data models, integrations, deployment paths, or commercial commitments from the repository name alone.

owns.name: project-initialization-metadata
owns.description: Doctrine adapter, project manifest, and placeholder project orientation for an otherwise empty repository.

doesNotOwn: HRIS domain behavior, customer data processing, auth, billing, deployment, or public API behavior until explicitly declared.

allowedDependencies.surface: central standards and project manifest schema

forbiddenCouplings: Do not import or assume another repository's HRIS internals.
Do not add production behavior until the owning project boundary is declared.

delivery.deployPath: not-applicable: no implementation or deployment path is declared yet
delivery.productionProof: not-applicable: no production surface is declared yet

commercial.decisionHome: not-applicable: no commercial decision surface declared for this placeholder
guardrails: Any future pricing, packaging, roadmap, or commercial experiment requires a Commercial ADR.

gaps.description: The repository is initialized, but concrete product goal, owner boundary, delivery path, and production proof remain undeclared.
